raw_response: {"simulated_user_message":"The conference lit a spark, but the only thing that feels solid is that I'm stuck—no time to sketch, no time to walk, just a blank wall of decisions. I keep putting off the next step, even though I know it’s the only way forward. It’s like I’m standing in front of a perfect design and can’t decide which blueprint to use.","problems_referred":["career_uncertainty","general_anxiety","procrastination","life_transition"]}

parsed.simulated_user_message: The conference lit a spark, but the only thing that feels solid is that I'm stuck—no time to sketch, no time to walk, just a blank wall of decisions. I keep putting off the next step, even though I know it’s the only way forward. It’s like I’m standing in front of a perfect design and can’t decide which blueprint to use.

parsed.reasoning: I'm a supportive friend who understands the user is feeling stuck and overwhelmed by decisions, needing a gentle nudge to take the next step. Given their request for a plan and cold start, I'll use the 'structure' strategy to propose a small, manageable step. The evidence shows the user values creativity and has a background in design, so acknowledging their perfectionistic tendencies is crucial. The user's current state, described as standing in front of a perfect design and unable to decide, suggests they need help breaking down their decisions into smaller, more manageable parts. My entry point will be to acknowledge their feeling of being stuck and propose a simple step to regain momentum.

evidence_used.content: standing in front of a perfect design and can’t decide which blueprint to use

parsed.final_response: You're feeling stuck, like you're staring at a blank wall of decisions, and it's hard to take that next step. Given your love for design and architecture, why not try breaking down your decisions into smaller, sketch-like plans? Start with just one aspect you want to tackle, like dedicating 15 minutes a day to sketching out ideas. Sometimes, starting small can help you find your footing again.

raw_response: {"simulated_user_message":"I keep sketching this new sustainable design in my head, but the reality of leaving the firm feels like a structural collapse. I know I should plan a roadmap, yet the idea of starting over at 35 makes me pause. I can't seem to get the first draft of my proposal out of my mind.","problems_referred":["career_uncertainty","general_anxiety","life_transition","procrastination"]}

parsed.simulated_user_message: I keep sketching this new sustainable design in my head, but the reality of leaving the firm feels like a structural collapse. I know I should plan a roadmap, yet the idea of starting over at 35 makes me pause. I can't seem to get the first draft of my proposal out of my mind.
